description: PCB test-case suite — covers 2L and 4L stackups with 0–3 inner planes. Feed each requirements JSON into the MCP pipeline; use the plane_layers column when calling optimize_placement.

test_cases.purpose: Regression baseline — 555 timer + 3 LEDs; should always route 100%.
ATtiny85 I2C sensor module — mixed SMD/TH, functional-group affinity.
ATmega328P-AU (TQFP-32) dev board — escape-router stress test, auto-reset circuit.
4-layer all-signal (no planes): tests router using inner layers as signal layers.
4-layer one GND plane (In1): data-logger with CAN + SD-card SPI.
4-layer full GND+PWR planes: STM32F407 + Ethernet + USB — power-integrity gold standard.
plane_layers=3 → clamped to 2; identical result to TC6. Verifies bounds handling.
